titleStmt.title: SII 34.255: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 255. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Rājarāja Sundarapāṇḍya, 14th year, Vaigāsi 22 = A.D. 1265.

This is a sale deed by the nagarattār of Arumoḻidēva-puram in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu alias Kāṉa-nāḍu for the land sold to an Ambalavaṉ Nāyagan who gifted it to the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār, for lamp service. The nagarattār made the land free of all taxes including kaḍamai, nāṭṭu-viniyōgam, ūr-viniyōgam, and paṇimakkaḷ-pēṟu. The sale price is mentioned in terms of the coin vāḷāl-vaḻitiṟandāṉ-paṇam. Water rights to the sold land are clearly specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī
svastiśrī kOccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ Irācarācaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiya tEvaṟ
kku yāṇṭu 10 4 tu vaikāci mātam 2 10 2 § nāḷ ṉamuṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉ nāyakaṟku kāṉanāṭāṉa virutarācapayaṅ
kara vaḷanāṭṭu Arumoḻitēvapurattu nakarattukkuc camaiñca nakarattārōm kāṇivilaipramāṇam paṇṇi
kkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivūr Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku vaitta tirunantāviḷakkukkut tiruviḷakku
ppuṟamāka cantirātittavaṟ cella Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivaṟku viṟṟut tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta ceṅkarakkuṭi vayali
l Iṟaiyiliyākat tiruccūlattāvaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta nilattukkup perunaṉkellai yāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai mēṟkunōkkip pākka
nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai vaṭakkunōkkip pārkka nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku vaṭakkum
mēlpārkkellai maṟamaṭakki Ellaiyil kiḻakkunōkkip pārkka nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai
mēṟpaṭiyūr Ellaikku teṟku teṟkunōkkip pārkka nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku teṟkum Āka Icainta peru
nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiyē tirunantāviḷakkukkut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttōm nāyakarkku nakarattārōm Ippaṭikkut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iṟaiyilipiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta nā
ṉkellaikkum nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlatēvarkkuṭpaṭṭa nilattukku vilai niccayitta vāḷālvaḻitiṟantāṉ paṇam 50 Ippaṇam Aim
tum vilaiyāvaṇakkaḷiyē kāṭṭiyēṟṟi kaccilavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttōm nāyakarku nakarattārōm
Ippaṭi tirunantāviḷakkukku tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟut tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta Inta nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa
nilattukku maṟamaṭakkik kuḷattu nīr pāyvitākavum kiḻakkut tiruviṭaiyāṭṭak kuḷatti nīr muṉpu nīrēṟum mariyāti Ēṟakkaṭavatāka Innilattukku va
ṭamai Upāti nāṭṭu viṉiyōkam Ūr viṉiyōkam maṟṟum Eppērppaṭṭa Upāti viniyōkaṅkaḷ Uḷḷavaiyum paṇimakkaḷ pēṟṟaiyu
m maṟṟum Eppērppaṭṭaṉavuṅ kaḻittuc cūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttōm nāyakaṟku nakarattārōm Ippaṭikku nakarattu
ñca vayirāvaṇar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuppaṭikkuttē kkar Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
ceṭṭiyārkku camaiñcu Iṉpa perumāḷ Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Inta Iṟaiyili piramāṇam Eḻutiṉēṉ Ivvūr naka
rakkaṇakku Aḻakiyaperumāḷ Utaiyañceytāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivukku muṉaiyataraiyar Eḻuttu poṉṉāṇṭār Eḻuttu vēṇāvu
ṭayār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
